title: 论文提炼｜Neuromem: A Granular Decomposition of the Streaming Lifecycle in External Memory for LLMs
content:

一句话总结：This ICML 2026 paper studies granular decomposition of the streaming lifecycle in external memory for LLMs.

This ICML 2026 paper studies granular decomposition of the streaming lifecycle in external memory for LLMs.
